commandMappings.notes: The flow plugin's IDEATE stage skill owns this. The in-repo fallback skill (ideating-features) was removed 2026-07-06; install the flow plugin to get the stage. Absorbs the legacy /ideate command (hard-removed in spec #257).

The flow plugin's EXECUTE stage skill owns this. The in-repo fallback skill (implementing-specifications) was removed 2026-07-06; install the flow plugin to get the stage. Absorbs the legacy /spec:execute command (hard-removed in spec #257).

instructionProjections.notes: AGENTS.md is the cross-tool durable instruction layer for this repo.
No project CLAUDE.md exists yet. If introduced later, treat it as Claude-specific adapter memory rather than the canonical shared instruction file.
Cursor rule projection is intentionally deferred until we decide whether AGENTS.md alone is sufficient.

hookPolicies.notes: Claude hooks remain native until another tool exposes a stable repo-level equivalent.
No Cursor repo-hook projection is defined in the current sync spec.

Codex supports repo-local hooks (.codex/hooks.json, 10 events, trust-gated). Generated from canonical .claude/settings.json via the vendored CANONICAL_TO_CODEXCLI_EVENT_NAMES map. Prefer the standalone hooks.json over inline config.toml (openai/codex#17532 breaks interactive SessionStart/Stop).
